query:
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.settings.draftSettings.pickOrder') as pick_order,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams')) as team_count,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[0].id') as team0_id,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[0].owners') as team0_owners,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.members[0].id') as member0_id,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.members[0].firstName') as member0_first
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2026 AND viewName = 'combined' 
LIMIT 1;
